title: chamaecrista calixtana
intro: Chamaecrista calixtana, also known as the sensitive plant, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family that is native to tropical regions of the Americas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Chamaecrista calixtana include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
